info.title: InterAI Risk Oracle Public API
info.description: Public hosted API contracts for InterAI Risk Oracle, an autonomous execution gateway for pre-execution verification of autonomous agents.

post.summary: Verify an autonomous action before execution
post.description: Receives the autonomous_execution request contract and returns a risk score, policy result, recommended action, machine-readable signals, and trust receipt metadata.

get.description: Machine-readable guidance for agents and builders deciding when and how to use InterAI before execution.

200.description: Pricing, x402, trial, and onboarding metadata

post.summary: Create a self-serve API key account
